reviews.review_description:
first of all, im not going to request a refund bcz this game looks promising and had a lot of potential.. BUT! the camera movement is shaky and make me dizzy, when the camera stop and face the dinosaur, can u please DO NOT make the camera shaking all the way like .. i know the guy is tired chased by the dino, but DONT make it shaky cz its make motion sickness.. just make the camera stay still while i shoot the dinosaur. graphic was nice, but thats a big weakness of this game, the shaky camera.. and second, why i cant shoot the dino if its not yet circled? its right in front of me and i soot it exactly at the head, but its missed bcz the dino not yet had the circle mark.. 
please fix 2 problem i list above, it will be a BIG improvement if u can solve all above, or at least, remove the shaky camera please.. will u?
i will promote this to reddit and all my social media if u canfix this problem, and 5/5 stars will definitely be yours
Whow chapter 1+2 about 6 minute 20 seconds brilliant can't wait to show grandchildren hope they do some more chapters

This game has great visuals, graphics are top notch, but the controls are terrible, 1- players have no control where they can go and when walking it feels like you're flying. 2- your gun, would be nice if players can aim their guns. Hopefully the updates will solved this issues.

developer_response.body: Hello Motawa. Could you please explain the problem more precisely?. We have found no issues regarding this kind of movement (jumping) you describe. Thank you.

developer_response.body: Controller AIM is now supported. Hope you enjoy it!

reviews.review_description: Before buying this game, I bought one in the store that was very similar for about three times the price and promised the best graphics in VR. That game was a complete travesty and one of the worst purchases I've ever made. I bought this game, and this game is everything that the other one should have been at a third of the price. The graphics are really good the whole experience feels extremely professional and polished like a console title.  I guess some of the bad reviews that are keeping the score of this game down came when there was no controller aiming and that's a shame that people have not updated their review. I have very little negative to say about this app so I will simply recommend that you buy it right away
Beautiful graphics and 3D. Really shows what's possible on the Gear VR. Uses head tracking for aim and VR controller button to shoot. Would benefit from an option to use the VR controller to aim.

developer_response.body: Controller AIM is now supported. Hope you enjoy it!

I give it 3 stars because it's a good game but it just needs a save spot instead of starting over from the first beginning so can yall get one please

reviews.review_title: Pretty unacceptable after 7 years of VR
reviews.review_description:
It's been known since basically the very beginning during DK1 days that you DO NOT move the player's head. You just DON"T. If it's slow moving on-the-rails that's one thing, but making the FOV bob up and down and all around is another thing entirely, and it's just... no other word for it, simply unacceptable, ESPECIALLY for a paid app. Developers should know better than that by now.

Also, your scaling is all wrong so the dinosaurs and your gun and the whole world around you look noticeably bigger than they ought to look.

And one of the joys of shooting in VR is that when I look somewhere and aim at it with my hand, things naturally just line up and the shot goes where I want it to. That instinct isn't going to go away, so I'm going to keep aiming at the dinosaurs' heads and pulling the trigger. It's pretty lame that the game won't register that the dinosaur has been hit unless a target has highlighted on it, and it's even lamer that the target for the head almost never pops up. It is CONSIDERABLY frustrating to consistently hit these things in the head and not have it count simply because the target didn't light up first.

I wanted to like this game. I really did. It runs smoothly and the graphics are pretty darn good for mobile, and the animations aren't bad. But the scale is wrong, and the aiming is wack (I can't progress past the second section where the raptors first show up because the targeting system is so counterintuitive), and the camera bobbing around is unacceptable.

Edited review... still average... still 3 stars...motion co troller is great... Biggest problem still present: You cannot shoot some dinos unless a target appears on them... Dino gets on your face... you shoot... NOTHING happens... oh suddenly a target appears... this is when you can shoot the dino...this sucks... you want to shoot the big ones in the head... nope target is on the chest... even if the head is closer than the chest... nope its the chest you have to shoot... but then a target appears on the head... ughnnn...
Otherwise its an ok on rail shooter. Graphics are decent... gameplay too...

Tecmobowl Ted I agree with you, I think I no what game your talking about and I feel the same. That other game for the price should be a little better than it is maybe the update might do that. But for right now this game is better than the newer game.

This game is a pretty decent shooter. It was challenging but not to the point where it could be super frustrating. Has about 5 levels of increasing difficulty. I beat it in a couple of hours but it was good fun.

It looks good and guns are a little too high up, but what I can't stand is you have to wait for an aiming rectal before you can fire, fun but needs some work! With that said, I give it four stars because, Being a programmer myself, a lot goes into these games. It is still very immersive regardless!

The game is extremely good.
